summary: Added ArcBot, a desktop-only floating AI assistant backed by the local Codex CLI.
details: ArcBot checks local Codex install and sign-in status, offers an explicit first-time CLI install action, keeps the chat input editable during setup, supports moving the chat panel by its header, shows compact mode and model dropdowns below the input, uses the configured Server Connection root path as the Codex project folder context, creates and uses %USERPROFILE%\Documents\ArcRho as the CLI working directory when the configured root is a network path, prefers npm/bundled Codex CLI shims over WindowsApps helper executables, avoids bundled .cmd path splitting by launching the Node entrypoint directly, can request context and the active in-memory method payload from the active DFM tab, lets Codex edit a local temp copy of that JSON, and can apply host-validated JSON edits only inside the configured Server Connection root with a method-history backup and latest-change revert.
